notes.anchor: both about Dolabella's health and about Tullia's
notes.note: Publius Cornelius Dolabella was Tullia's third husband, married in 50 BC; the union was already strained and would end in divorce in 46 BC. This terse note from Brundisium (December 48 BC) shows Cicero worn down by exile, illness in the family, and his political ruin after Pharsalus.
